drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures munitions and explosive materials (C-4, TNT, Det Cord, TarTarus binary explosive) for defense use. No explicit UXV/drone-specific mention on site; products fall in the munitions category that maps to drone-delivered warhead payloads.

evidence.snippet:
Det Cord
========
PRIMACORD detonating cords are flexible linear explosives with a core of PETN explosive encased in a textile outer jacket. PRIMACORD detonating cords are designed for use as trunklines and/or downlines in various mining, quarrying and construction applications.

tagline: Fort Myers–based manufacturer of military-grade explosives and munitions (C-4, TNT, Det Cord, TarTarus binary gel) holding Federal Explosives Licenses Type 20/23 and active ITAR registration. Leadership includes former Navy SEALs and special-operations personnel. NDAA compliance status and specific defense program wins not publicly documented.
